summary: Customer testimonial from Robin Kane in Willits, CA, praising Cavallo Boots for her Mustang Fez and the brand's sizing and customer service.
Article on sole bruising in horses, covering common causes like rocks, laminitis, and ill-fitting metal shoes, and how barefoot remedies help.
Overview of two trail-riding smartphone apps, Horse Trail App and EQUITrail, highlighting GPS tracking, mapping, and safety features for equestrians.
Reflective blog post comparing centuries of unchanged metal horseshoes to modern Cavallo Hoof Boots and the future of hoof care.
Customer testimonial from Ireland about using the Cavallo English Raised Wither Saddle Pad to comfort an older horse with muscle atrophy.
Post on riding adventure holidays Cavallo sponsors, including Alberta's Sierra West cattle ride and bitless, barefoot riding retreats in Andalucia, Spain.
Article advocating transitioning horses to barefoot for winter, explaining hoof mechanism benefits and prevention of conditions like navicular and laminitis.
Continuation on winter hoof care, comparing trimming vs shoeing costs and promoting Cavallo Hoof Boots for snow and ice riding after pulling metal shoes.
Reflective post on patience in horse training, sharing favorite quotes about setting horses up to succeed and building partnership and harmony.
Q&A interview with a UK barefoot horse owner about her trotter gelding, his transition to barefoot, and experiences across dressage and jumping.
Inspirational essay by Carole Herder using a stallion refusing to jump a fence as a metaphor for stepping beyond personal comfort zones.
Opinion piece by Carole Herder questioning why metal horseshoes persist as tradition, drawing a parallel to banned dog ear cropping and tail docking.
